Layer.JumpMessageCommand: %function(self) self:queuecommand('Jump1') self:queuecommand('Up'..jump) if jump == 1 then self:sleep(.2) self:queuecommand('Jump3') end if jump == 2 then self:sleep(.25) self:queuecommand('Jump3') end if jump == 3 then self:sleep(.3) self:queuecommand('Jump2') self:sleep(.2) self:queuecommand('Jump3') end if jump == 4 then self:sleep(.4) self:queuecommand('Jump2') self:sleep(.2) self:queuecommand('Jump3') end if jump == 5 then self:sleep(.3) self:queuecommand('Jump3') self:sleep(.2) self:queuecommand('Jump1') self:sleep(.2) self:queuecommand('Jump3') end end
Layer.Pass1Command: %function(self) if float == 1 then self:sleep(.8) self:queuecommand('Win') end end
Layer.Fail1Command: %function(self) if float == 1 then self:sleep(.6) self:queuecommand('Fall') end end
Layer.children: <Layer File="@Meatboy() .. '/Animate.xml'" InitCommand="queuecommand,Sprint" Up1Command="decelerate,.2;addy,-20;accelerate,.2;y,0" Up2Command="decelerate,.3;addy,-25;accelerate,.3;y,0" Up3Command="decelerate,.4;addy,-35;accelerate,.4;y,0" Up4Command="decelerate,.5;addy,-45;accelerate,.5;y,0" Up5Command="decelerate,.3;addy,-25;accelerate,.1;addy,5;decelerate,.1;addy,5;accelerate,.1;addy,-5;decelerate,.1;addy,-5;accelerate,.3;y,0" Pass2Command="%function(self) self:stoptweening() y = self:GetY() if y < -12 then self:accelerate((-12-y)/300) self:y(-12) self:addx(-6-y/2) else self:queuecommand('Fetus') end end" Fail2Command="stoptweening;queuecommand,Splode;queuecommand,Extra" Fail4Command="%function(self) self:stoptweening() if self:GetY() > -10 then self:accelerate(.1) elseif self:GetY() > -20 then self:accelerate(.2) else self:accelerate(.3) end self:y(0) end" FloatMessageCommand="queuecommand,Reset;y,-15;queuecommand,Jump1;accelerate,.28;y,-30;decelerate,.28;y,-45;queuecommand,Jump3;accelerate,.28;y,-30;decelerate,.285;y,-15;queuecommand,Float" WinCommand="stoptweening;linear,.2;y,-5" FallCommand="stoptweening;linear,.4;y,25" />

ActorFrame.Fail2Command: %function() if Pallette() == '' or Pallette() == 'W' then s = math.random(0,7) Sound('meat_death'..s..'.ogg') else s = math.random(0,4) Sound('Retro_death'..s..'.ogg') end end
